calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING
Off Calendar Oct-01-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gina Haran of LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP (415-362-2580), for defendant Cooper Brothers.
Todd M. Thacker of WFBM, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant Cosco Fire Protection, Inc.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). The Court did not consider the opposition filed by Defendant Cooper Brothers Inc. for failure to lodge courtesy copies with the Court. (Local Rule 2.7B.) The trial date of December 14, 2020 is vacated. The new trial date is January 19, 2021 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is January 29, 2021.

All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the initial January 6, 2020 trial date.

Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than December 4, 2020. Responses to the demand are due no later than December 18, 2020. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by January 8, 2021 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, January 14, 2021 at 9 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
